phase_history.key_outcome: Requirements intake: 1 new capability scheduler-cli wiring all 5 prior stages; 6 requirements, 20 edge cases, STRIDE PASS (1 High RF-1 secret-leak mitigated). Scope closed: V1 = osspulse run end-to-end; cron/delta/seen-filtering = V2 out of scope. Key decision D-1 (no-LLM path delivers unsummarized digest). No Figma (CLI).
Functional spec: 22 ACs (all CONFIRMED), 12 BRs, 6 INTs across 6 requirements. Resolved A6 error-taxonomy into AC-7-004/005/017. Added Non-Goals section. spec-auditor PASS, openspec validate PASS.

6 ADRs, 0 endpoints (CLI-only, no openapi.yaml), 24 tasks across 7 groups (2 checkpoints), 22/22 ACs covered. Resolved GAP-001 (model+Redis derived in pipeline, no Config change — ADR-002) and GAP-003 (exit 0 on all-fail/rate-limit — ADR-005). Normative exception->action table (ADR-003). openspec validate PASS, cross-artifact-audit 0 CRITICAL/HIGH.

25/25 tasks complete. 271 tests pass, 98.51% coverage. pipeline.py implements run_pipeline(config) wiring all 5 stages. ADR-003 catch order verified most-specific-first. RF-1 clean. No-LLM path implemented. import isolation test excludes pipeline.py.

GO — 0 Critical/High bugs. 22/22 ACs verified. Coverage 98.51%. Security audit clean (RF-1 mitigated). Dependency audit clean (pip-audit clean). 3 hollow TCs (H1-a/b/c) Low severity, accepted via code review. Operator note: live smoke test required before S6 archive.

S6 complete — release.md, CHANGELOG.md (0.1.0–0.7.0), pyproject.toml bumped to 0.7.0. Lint+format+271 tests pass. BrokenPipe exit-0 confirmed (environment-limited; operator must verify with live token). README verified accurate. 1 pre-existing E501 lint error in test_cli.py fixed. Routing to sdlc for archive + git tag v0.7.0.

active_concerns: ADR-003 catch ORDER verified PASS — most-specific-first confirmed in _collect_all.
RF-1 (HIGH) verified CLEAN — all log calls use type(exc).__name__ or static strings.
BrokenPipeError handler (AC-7-013): static-only test — S6 operator MUST verify: uv run osspulse run | head -1 exits cleanly before tagging release.
Live integration smoke test NOT run in S5 (no GITHUB_TOKEN). S6 MUST run live smoke before archiving.
H1-b (AC-7-021) / H1-c (AC-7-018): hollow TCs, Low priority — improve in next cycle if test quality standards raised.
Import isolation test valid only from source install — if project ships as wheel, test needs updating.

terminology.osspulse run: Single CLI entry point triggering one full V1 pipeline run.
terminology.run_pipeline(config): Orchestrator in osspulse.pipeline wiring the 5 stages; replaces the NotImplementedError stub (AC-7-003).
terminology.No-LLM-provider path: llm_provider is None -> wrap RawItem as SummarizedItem(summary=NO_LLM_PLACEHOLDER), render, exit 0 (D-1, ADR-006, AC-7-008/022).
terminology.Batch summarize: Pipeline calls summarize_items(list[RawItem]) exactly once, not per-item summarize() (AC-7-007, BR-7-009).
terminology.Auth-fatal: AuthError (401/403) is fatal exit 1 (shared token), never per-repo skip (AC-7-005, BR-7-002).
terminology.Rate-limit-terminal: Terminal RateLimitError breaks the repo loop but delivers items already collected, exit 0 (AC-7-017, BR-7-008).
terminology.Seen-recording (V1): mark_seen recorded for idempotency; seen items NOT filtered (delta is V2) (AC-7-011, BR-7-011).
terminology.One-digest rule: One run = one summarize_items, one render, one deliver call (A2, BR-7-007).
terminology._PROVIDER_MODEL / _model_for: Pipeline-private provider->model map + fallback supplying the required SummarizerConfig.model without a Config field (ADR-002, AC-7-007).
terminology._build_cache / _NullCache: Best-effort Redis construction from REDIS_URL; _NullCache on failure so the run degrades not crashes (ADR-002, AC-7-009).
terminology.Exception->action ladder: Per-repo try ordered most-specific-first: AuthError(fatal) -> RateLimitError(break+deliver) -> Invalid/Network/CollectorError(skip) (ADR-003).
terminology.Sanctioned cross-stage importer: pipeline.py is the ONLY module allowed to import multiple stages; import-isolation test excludes it (ADR-001, AC-7-002).

next_action.prerequisite: S6 release artifacts complete: release.md, CHANGELOG.md, pyproject.toml v0.7.0, lint/format/tests all pass. Operator: run live smoke test with real GITHUB_TOKEN before tagging v0.7.0.
next_action.blocker: AWAITING ARCHIVE — operator live smoke test recommended before git tag
next_action.routes_to: openspec archive scheduler-cli-7 + git tag v0.7.0
watch_items: Run live smoke test: uv run osspulse run --config config.toml with real GITHUB_TOKEN before tagging.
uv run osspulse run | head -1 must exit cleanly (BrokenPipeError handler — AC-7-013). Verify with working config.
Tag v0.7.0 only after live smoke test passes.
H1-b (AC-7-021) / H1-c (AC-7-018): Low priority hollow TCs — note in retro, improve next cycle.
next_action.key_outcome: S6 COMPLETE — release.md, CHANGELOG.md, version 0.7.0, lint+format+tests pass. Routing to sdlc for archive.
